_patch_meta.description: VCB-008 re-evaluation under v3_8 of 9 terms across 5 registries (041 defilement, 087 indignation, 148 sincerity, 189 malice, 209 likeness). 8 terms NO-CHANGE: G3435 molunō (5001), G3436 molusmos (787), G0024 aganaktēsis (922), G1505 eilikrineia (1126), G1506 eilikrinēs (6231), H7589 she.at (1275), G4832 summorfos (7360), G4833 summorfoomai (1377) — all classifications, groups, anchors confirmed correct under v3_8 §3 filter and §6.2 Step 3 characteristic-perspective grouping. 1 term REVISED: H2152 zal.a.phah (921) — group 921-001 description sharpened to drop 'burning of suffering as an inner experience' clause that did not survive the v3_8 term-level filter (GR-PROG-007); 2 verses (Psa 11:6 vid 170390, Lam 5:10 vid 25322) flipped from is_relevant=1·is_related=1 to is_relevant=0·set_aside_reason='physical_only' because the term in those verses names meteorological/physical referents and does not carry inner-being content at term level. Anchor Psa 119:53 (vid 170391) retained; R4 satisfied. All term classifications advance to vc_completed and md_version bumps.

set.context_description: Term names hot indignation as an inner moral response — the rising of righteous outrage at wickedness that forsakes God's law
set.notes: v3_8 re-evaluation (VCB-008): prior bundled-description 'burning of suffering as an inner experience' did not survive term-level filter (GR-PROG-007); description sharpened to surviving engagement (Psa 119:53). Psa 11:6 and Lam 5:10 reassigned to set_aside/physical_only in this patch.

operations.description: Revised context description for group 921-001 (H2152 zal.a.phah): drop bundled 'burning of suffering' clause; retain inner moral outrage characteristic only

set.notes: v3_8 re-evaluation (VCB-008): term names meteorological judgement-element ('scorching wind' as portion of the wicked's cup); no term-level inner-being engagement. Verse-theme reading under prior rules does not survive GR-PROG-007 term-level filter.

operations.description: Psa 11:6 — reclassified: relevant→set_aside (physical_only), removed from group 921-001

set.notes: v3_8 re-evaluation (VCB-008): term names physical body-condition (skin hot as oven from famine); no term-level inner-being engagement. Inner-being lament in Lam 5 carried by other terms in other verses, not by zal.a.phah here.

operations.description: Lam 5:10 — reclassified: relevant→set_aside (physical_only), removed from group 921-001

_patch_summary.nature: v3_8 re-evaluation — 1 term revised, 8 terms confirmed no-change (mixed pattern per VC instruction §7.9.3b)
